markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review keyword research and align on content strategy for Ambient.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy:** Focus on high-value content (stats, solutions, comparisons) and a batch of refreshes for legacy articles (e.g., AI video analytics, ROI) to capture traffic and improve internal linking.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [**New Keyword Opportunity:** Target "AI layer for \[VMS/camera brand\]" keywords to capture high-intent, bottom-of-funnel traffic. Bailey will ask Ambient for a list of target brands.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [**Image Pipeline:** The new image pipeline is an incremental fix; the awkward text overlay will remain until Ambient's Q1 rebrand is complete. A more impactful infographic workflow will be proposed.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
  - [**Brand Glossary:** A brand glossary is being built to standardize terminology and resolve client feedback conflicts. Bailey will present it to Ambient for validation, especially the "Ambient-only" terms.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)

## Topics

### Keyword Research & Content Strategy

  - [Mariana reviewed Jacob's keyword study, categorizing opportunities to align with existing content and identify gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [**Statistics:**](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
      - [Create general "AI in physical security statistics" and corporate "workplace violence statistics" articles.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
      - [Strategy → Create a few high-quality, regularly updated articles (e.g., for 2027) instead of many one-off pieces.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [**Solutions:**](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
      - [Expand successful "gun detection for schools" content to other verticals like healthcare.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
      - [Create curated solution lists for other verticals, replicating the success of the school and hospital lists.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
  - [**Refreshes:**](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
      - [Prioritize legacy articles with high traffic potential but outdated content.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=2074.0)
      - [Key targets: "AI video analytics" (2023 article) and "physical security ROI."](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=2083.0)
      - [The standard refresh workflow is ineffective; Mariana will manually rewrite articles, using competitor outlines as a guide.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=2152.0)
  - [**Alternatives/Comparisons:**](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
      - [**New Opportunity:** Target "AI layer for \[VMS/camera brand\]" keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
          - [Rationale → Captures high-intent, bottom-of-funnel traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
          - [Test with "AI layer for Verkada cameras" (highest search volume) first.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [**Process:** Bailey will check on the client's comparison matrix timeline to avoid redundant work.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)

### Image Pipeline & Visuals

  - [The new image pipeline is live, generating lighter images with a "catchy phrase" hook instead of the full SEO title.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [**Problem:** The text overlay is awkward and conflicts with the on-page SEO title, creating a poor user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [**Context:** This is an incremental fix. Ambient's Q1 rebrand will likely dictate a new, more comprehensive visual direction.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** Propose an infographic workflow, which Ambient's team (Atul) liked. Bailey will ask for the brand's color palette to enable this.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)

### Brand Glossary

  - [Mariana is building a glossary to standardize terminology and resolve conflicting client feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)
  - [**Categories:**](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)
      - [Legacy systems (e.g., VMS)](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)
      - [Product features](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
      - [Ambient-only terms (e.g., "thread signatures," "agentic AI")](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [**Goal:** Ensure consistent brand language and provide writers with varied terminology to avoid repetition.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Mariana:**](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
      - [Send Bailey the refresh list and brand glossary spreadsheet.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
      - [Prioritize refreshes based on internal linking needs and traffic potential.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=2099.0)
      - [Prepare the next batch of article ideas based on the keyword study.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
      - [Ask Ambient for the comparison matrix timeline.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
      - [Ask Ambient for their brand color palette to enable the infographic workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
      - [Present the brand glossary to Ambient for validation, focusing on the "Ambient-only" terms.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=1896.0)
      - [Share the meeting agenda with Mariana for review.](https://fathom.video/share/osXzSYxuKezHTCH4VnxM5-JfkC4b_HUE?tab=summary&timestamp=2216.0)
